cards.name: 3 of Pentacles
cards.interpretation: teamwork, shared goals, collaboration, apprenticeship, effort, pooling energy

cards.name: 6 of Pentacles, reversed
cards.interpretation: power dynamics, abuse of generosity, strings attached gifts, inequality, extortion

cards.name: ⅩⅩⅠ The World, reversed
cards.interpretation: lack of closure, lack of achievement, feeling incomplete, emptiness
